zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Grey於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾時，她的父親Henry de Grey 1st Baron35歲，母親Eleanor de Courtenay30歲。她於1318年之前與John de Somery在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1324年享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Grey于大约1290年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾时，她的父亲Henry de Grey 1st Baron35岁，母亲Eleanor de Courtenay30岁。她于1318年之前与John de Somery在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1324年享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Grey was born about 1290, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Grey 1st Baron, was 35 and her mother, Eleanor de Courtenay, was 30. She married John de Somery before 1318, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1324, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Grey est née environ 1290, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Grey 1st Baron, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Courtenay, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John de Somery avant 1318, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1324, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy de Grey um 1290 in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Grey 1st Baron 35 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Courtenay 30. Sie hat vor 1318 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom John de Somery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1324 im Alter von 35 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Grey è nata il circa 1290 nel Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Grey 1st Baron, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Courtenay, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John de Somery prima del 1318, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1324, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Greyが約1290年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父Henry de Grey 1st Baronは35歳，母Eleanor de Courtenayは30歳であった。1318年以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでJohn de Someryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1324年に35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Grey(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Grey 1st Baron(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Courtenay(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1318년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 John de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Grey 1st Baron, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Courtenay, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Somery antes 1318, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1324, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Grey родилась около 1290 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Grey 1st Baron было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Courtenay, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Somery перед 1318 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1324 г. в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy de Grey nació aproximadamente 1290, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Grey 1st Baron, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Courtenay, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John de Somery antes de 1318, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1324, a la edad de 35 años.
